name: CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupReplXfm

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.GOOD_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupReplXfm; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ERR_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupReplXfm; WITH cte AS ( SELECT TMP.CLM_ID, TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, TMP.SRC_SYS_CD, TMP.CLNT_ID, TMP.BTCH_ID, TMP.ROW_CRT_DT, TMP.SVC_YR_MO, TMP.PD_YR_MO, TMP.ST, TMP.METRO_STAT_AREA, TMP.EXCL_CD, TMP.PRTL_YR_GRP, TMP.MCARE_COV, TMP.HCG_IN, TMP.MBR_AGE_BAND, TMP.CNTR_AGE_BAND, TMP.HCG_AGE_BAND, TMP.DMGRPHC_GRP, TMP.STD_INDST_CD, TMP.PCP_ID, TMP.MNGD_POP, TMP.DRG, TMP.CMS_ERR_CD, TMP.CASE_ADM_ID, TMP.MR_LN, TMP.MR_LN_DTL, TMP.MR_LN_CASE, TMP.PLN_BNF_PCKG_LN, TMP.MCARE_ADVNTG_LN, TMP.MCARE_ADVNTG_LN_DTL, TMP.SPEC_TYP, TMP.FCLTY_CASE_ID, TMP.MR_CASES_ADM, TMP.MR_UNIT_DAYS, TMP.MR_PROC, TMP.MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, TMP.MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY, TMP.MR_PROC_PATN_PAY, TMP.MR_BILL_AMT, TMP.MR_ALW_AMT, TMP.MR_PD_AMT, TMP.MR_COPAY_AMT, TMP.MR_COINS_AMT, TMP.MR_DEDCT_AMT, TMP.MR_PATN_PAY_AMT, TMP.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM, TMP.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, CASE WHEN (CLM.CLM_LN_SK IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(TMP.SRC_SYS_CD))=0 OR LENGTH(TRIM(TMP.CLM_ID))=0 OR LENGTH(TRIM(TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO))=0) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ERRIND, MPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK FROM @{pipeline().parameters.TempOwner}.BLUEKC_HCG_TEMP TMP LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.K_CLM_LN CLM ON TMP.CLM_ID = CLM.CLM_ID AND CASE WHEN (TRIM(TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO) = '' OR TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE CAST(TRIM(TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO) AS SMALLINT) END = CLM.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MPNG ON MPNG.SRC_CD = TMP.SRC_SYS_CD AND MPNG.SRC_DOMAIN_NM = 'SOURCE SYSTEM' AND MPNG.TRGT_DOMAIN_NM = 'SOURCE SYSTEM' AND MPNG.SRC_CLCTN_CD = 'IDS' AND MPNG.TRGT_CLCTN_CD = 'IDS' ) SELECT dbo.trim_default(cte.CLM_ID) AS CLM_ID, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO) AS INT) AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, dbo.trim_default(cte.SRC_SYS_CD) AS SRC_SYS_CD, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.BTCH_ID) AS INT) AS BTCH_ID, dbo.trim_default(cte.ROW_CRT_DT) AS ROW_CRT_DT, dbo.trim_default(cte.SVC_YR_MO) AS SVC_YR_MO, dbo.trim_default(cte.PD_YR_MO) AS PD_YR_MO, dbo.trim_default(cte.ST) AS ST, dbo.trim_default(cte.METRO_STAT_AREA) AS METRO_STAT_AREA, dbo.trim_default(cte.EXCL_CD) AS EXCL_CD, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.PRTL_YR_GRP) AS INT) AS PRTL_YR_GRP, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MCARE_COV) AS INT) AS MCARE_COV, dbo.trim_default(cte.HCG_IN) AS HCG_IN, dbo.trim_default(cte.MBR_AGE_BAND) AS MBR_AGE_BAND, dbo.trim_default(cte.CNTR_AGE_BAND) AS CNTR_AGE_BAND, dbo.trim_default(cte.HCG_AGE_BAND) AS HCG_AGE_BAND, dbo.trim_default(cte.DMGRPHC_GRP) AS DMGRPHC_GRP, dbo.trim_default(cte.STD_INDST_CD) AS STD_INDST_CD, dbo.trim_default(cte.PCP_ID) AS PCP_ID, dbo.trim_default(cte.MNGD_POP) AS MNGD_POP, dbo.trim_default(cte.DRG) AS DRG, dbo.trim_default(cte.CMS_ERR_CD) AS CMS_ERR_CD, dbo.trim_default(cte.CASE_ADM_ID) AS CASE_ADM_ID, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_LN))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_LN) END AS MR_LN, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_LN_DTL))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_LN_DTL) END AS MR_LN_DTL, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_LN_CASE))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_LN_CASE) END AS MR_LN_CASE, dbo.trim_default(cte.PLN_BNF_PCKG_LN) AS PLN_BNF_PCKG_LN, dbo.trim_default(cte.MCARE_ADVNTG_LN) AS MCARE_ADVNTG_LN, dbo.trim_default(cte.MCARE_ADVNTG_LN_DTL) AS MCARE_ADVNTG_LN_DTL, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte.SPEC_TYP))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE dbo.trim_default(cte.SPEC_TYP) END AS SPEC_TYP, dbo.trim_default(cte.FCLTY_CASE_ID) AS FCLTY_CASE_ID, CAST(cte.MR_CASES_ADM AS INT) AS MR_CASES_ADM, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_UNIT_DAYS))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_UNIT_DAYS) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) END AS MR_UNIT_DAYS, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_PROC) AS INT) AS MR_PROC, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY) AS INT) END AS MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_PROC_PATN_PAY) AS INT) AS MR_PROC_PATN_PAY, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_BILL_AMT) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS MR_BILL_AMT, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_ALW_AMT) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS MR_ALW_AMT, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_PD_AMT) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS MR_PD_AMT, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_COPAY_AMT) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS MR_COPAY_AMT, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_COINS_AMT) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS MR_COINS_AMT, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_DEDCT_AMT) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS MR_DEDCT_AMT, CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.MR_PATN_PAY_AMT) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS MR_PATN_PAY_AMT, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM) AS INT) END AS PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY) AS INT) END AS PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, CAST(cte.CD_MPPNG_SK AS INT) AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.GOOD_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupReplXfm FROM cte WHERE dbo.trim_default(cte.ERRIND)='N'; SELECT cte.SRC_SYS_CD, cte.CLNT_ID, cte.CLM_ID, cte.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, cte.BTCH_ID, cte.ROW_CRT_DT, cte.SVC_YR_MO, cte.PD_YR_MO, cte.ST, cte.METRO_STAT_AREA, cte.EXCL_CD, cte.PRTL_YR_GRP, cte.MCARE_COV, cte.HCG_IN, cte.MBR_AGE_BAND, cte.CNTR_AGE_BAND, cte.HCG_AGE_BAND, cte.DMGRPHC_GRP, cte.STD_INDST_CD, cte.PCP_ID, cte.MNGD_POP, cte.DRG, cte.CMS_ERR_CD, cte.CASE_ADM_ID, cte.MR_LN, cte.MR_LN_DTL, cte.MR_LN_CASE, cte.PLN_BNF_PCKG_LN, cte.MCARE_ADVNTG_LN, cte.MCARE_ADVNTG_LN_DTL, cte.SPEC_TYP, cte.FCLTY_CASE_ID, cte.MR_CASES_ADM, cte.MR_UNIT_DAYS, cte.MR_PROC, cte.MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, cte.MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY, cte.MR_PROC_PATN_PAY, cte.MR_BILL_AMT, cte.MR_ALW_AMT, cte.MR_PD_AMT, cte.MR_COPAY_AMT, cte.MR_COINS_AMT, cte.MR_DEDCT_AMT, cte.MR_PATN_PAY_AMT, cte.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM, cte.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ERR_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupReplXfm FROM cte WHERE dbo.trim_default(cte.ERRIND)='Y';
